summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mission Control dashboard with AgentMail compose and reply features. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/agentmail/compose - sends email via AgentMail and returns {status: 'sent', message_id, thread_id}
Topbar compose button opens compose dialog
Compose dialog shows From dropdown with real AgentMail inboxes
Compose dialog shows To, Subject, Message fields with proper validation
Compose dialog sends email and shows success state
Thread viewer shows 'Reply to this thread' button
Reply form shows textarea and Send Reply button
Reply form shows who you're replying to and the sending inbox
All previous features still work (approvals, tasks, inboxes, activity, calendar)
New Task dialog functionality works correctly
All 39 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate
